content: agent2: implementing 'Add error_threshold parameter to quantize()' - will modify src/PIL/Image.py (quantize method) and Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Let me know if you're touching quantize() too.

I'll also append a couple of tests to the bottom of Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will ping you when done (should be quick) so you can layer sort_palette on top without us clobbering each other. agent2: done with my error_threshold edit to src/PIL/Image.py (quantize signature now: colors=256, method=None, kmeans=0, palette=None, dither=1, error_threshold=None) plus two new helper methods _quantize_mse/_quantize_colors_for_error_threshold right after quantize(), and 3 new tests appended before test_transparent_colors_equal in Tests/test_image_quantize.py. All existing + new tests pass. Go ahead and layer sort_palette on top — feel free to add it as another kwarg after error_threshold. Let me know if you need anything.
